abilities.description: Target creature an opponent controls with power less than or equal to NICKNAME's power gains skulk until end of turn. Goad it. (A creature with skulk can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.)
abilities.target_prompt: Select target creature an opponent controls with power less than or equal to NICKNAME's power

triggers.description: Whenever a creature with skulk deals combat damage to one of your opponents, put a +1/+1 counter on NICKNAME and draw a card.
